name: Who Am I? History-Aware Profiles for Student Simulation in Tutoring Dialogues
summary: arXiv preprint introducing history-conditioned student simulation with profile generation and a student simulator trained with SFT, DPO, and GRPO over real math tutoring dialogue and question-response histories.
version_note: arXiv v1 submitted 2026-05-28; treated as current preprint evidence.

access_attempts.notes: arXiv PDF is available and was used for prior full-text extraction.
